notes: Single golden entry (gd-001) from the Phase 0 smoke dataset. Precision@3 reflects a 2-chunk index (only 2 chunks exist); K=3 was not fully saturated. Latency figures are CLI wall-clock and include Node.js startup overhead (~800ms). In-process retrieval latency over 2 in-memory chunks is negligible (< 5ms). These figures are the reference baseline before any Phase 2 retrieval-quality improvements (hybrid search, re-ranking).
